name: ai-canvas
description: AI Canvas 编辑器（Web / Electron 桌面端，React + Konva）
author: AI Canvas

scripts.dev:api: sh -c 'set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; exec uv run uvicorn backend.app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${API_PORT:-13555} --reload'
scripts.dev:api:no-reload: sh -c 'set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; exec uv run uvicorn backend.app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${API_PORT:-13555}'
scripts.build:desktop: cross-env ELECTRON_BUILD=1 npm run build && electron-builder
scripts.build:desktop:win: cross-env ELECTRON_BUILD=1 npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win --x64
scripts.build:desktop:win:zip: cross-env ELECTRON_BUILD=1 npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win zip --x64
scripts.build:desktop:win:cross: cross-env ELECTRON_BUILD=1 npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false USE_SYSTEM_NSIS=true electron-builder --win --x64
scripts.build:desktop:linux: cross-env ELECTRON_BUILD=1 npm run build && electron-builder --linux --x64
scripts.build:desktop:mac: cross-env ELECTRON_BUILD=1 npm run build && electron-builder --mac --x64
